caption: The video shows a website page featuring a list of NBA teams, such as "11. GOLDEN STATE WARRIORS" and "12. DENVER NUGGETS," alongside a chat window. The chat displays messages from users "glowbug27" saying "turning" and "Nightbot" stating, "Click the link for the BREAKS SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/2ySdeK8y." Below this, a banner for "JASYPS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible, featuring a photo of three men wearing casual shirts. The page also includes a timestamp of "2023-05-20 03:13:25 UTC" and a message stating, "You have randomized this list 5 times." Throughout the sequence, the screen remains completely static; the list of teams, the chat messages, the logos, and the images of the people do not change, and no motion or interaction occurs across the frames.
